title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 10–13, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I thought Sanji hated the owner!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I took everything away from that damn geezer.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't want him to lose anything else!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now's not the time to ramble about ancient history...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And I told you not to treat me as a damn kid anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: your story's got nothin' to do with me.

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
